# AI Classification — HITL Workflow
# Reads incoming webhook data and adds AI classification + confidence score

import random

for item in _items:
    data = item["json"]
    
    # Simulate AI classification (replace with real model in production)
    categories = ["approved", "needs_review", "rejected"]
    weights = [0.5, 0.35, 0.15]
    
    ai_label = random.choices(categories, weights=weights)[0]
    ai_confidence = round(random.uniform(0.55, 0.98), 2)
    
    # Add AI results to the item
    item["json"]["ai_label"] = ai_label
    item["json"]["ai_confidence"] = ai_confidence
    item["json"]["requires_human_review"] = ai_confidence < 0.80
    item["json"]["workflow_stage"] = "ai_classified"

return _items

# TRUE branch — item requires human review
# Flag it and prepare for human review queue

for item in _items:
    item["json"]["workflow_stage"] = "pending_human_review"
    item["json"]["review_url"] = "http://localhost:5050"
    item["json"]["action_required"] = "Human review needed — AI confidence below 80%"
    item["json"]["priority"] = "HIGH" if item["json"].get("ai_confidence", 0) < 0.65 else "MEDIUM"

return _items

# FALSE branch — high confidence, auto-approved
# No human review needed

for item in _items:
    item["json"]["workflow_stage"] = "auto_approved"
    item["json"]["action_required"] = "None — auto-approved by AI"
    item["json"]["approved_at"] = "auto"
    item["json"]["priority"] = "LOW"

return _items
